metar.rawOb: METAR KOZR 260455Z AUTO 20003KT 10SM CLR 16/14 A3015 RMK AO2 SLP211 T01640137

sevenDay.synopsis: All good today with MVFR cigs and NEG hazards! Tomorrow should be quiet, too, but early Friday AM, IFR cigs and fog roll in. Conditions should improve by 09L, giving way to a VFR rest of the day. No issues for the weekend, but we could see wind gusts of 20kts each AM/PM. The nice weather continues thru the first part of next week.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 25 MAR - 31 MAR
